subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Thou beholdest Thy loved ones amidst those servants who have turned away from Thy countenance and disputed Thy signs [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا الهی تری احبائک بین عبادک الذین اعرضوا عن وجهک و جادلوا بایاتک و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution
